_comment: finance-desk composes the accounting-bucket atoms. All arithmetic is tools/finance.py offline (no tokens); reads are flag-free, record writes gate on finance_management (+ invoice_generation for invoices). Nothing is ever sent by the system; the consequential-action gate precedes any external money commitment. cost-estimate and proposal-price join in P30 chunk 6.
description: Invoice drafting, accounts-receivable review, cost estimates, and proposal price floors.

steps.input_from: deal_id + line items from the deal record + anchor_date
steps.condition: action is invoice; write requires finance_management and invoice_generation
action is ar; read-only, always available
action is ar and a single deal_id is given (per-deal narrative)

note: Master gate for writes: finance_management. deal-resourcing keeps the per-deal trigger-based invoice schedule; this spoke drafts the actual invoice records and reads the whole book. Boundary and gate language come from shared/finance-engine.md; the AR chase queue feeds the content calendar and production tasks via the import_finance MCP handoff (chunk 8), never a parallel calendar.
